Title: Stray file shaders/lib/main.dart
Problem: A stale/outdated copy of main.dart committed inside shaders/ directory. Flutter analyzer picks it up recursively and causes ~30 cascading errors: class_in_class, cast_to_non_type, undefined_method, duplicate_definition, and more.

Title: Test references non-existent class IconicStudioApp
Problem: Test pumps const IconicStudioApp() but root widget is IconStudioPro. Produces 'The name IconicStudioApp isn't a class' compile errors. Even if fixed, IconStudioPro wraps AuthGate (login screen) so studio assertions like find.text('Export Icon') would fail.
Fix: Replace const IconicStudioApp() with MaterialApp(home: const StudioPage()) to render studio directly, bypassing auth gate.

Title: const MaterialApp wrapping non-const ShaderBuilder
Problem: ShaderBuilder test uses const MaterialApp(...) but ShaderBuilder receives a closure (function literal) — the tree cannot be const. Error: 'Arguments of a constant creation must be constant expressions'.
Fix: Remove the const keyword from the MaterialApp constructor in that test case.

Title: Deprecated Color.withOpacity() calls (6 occurrences)
Problem: Color.withOpacity() was deprecated in Flutter 3.27. Fails --fatal-infos lint on current/future Flutter stable.
Fix: Replace each withOpacity(x) call with withValues(alpha: x).

Title: RenderRepaintBoundary cast_to_non_type analyzer error
Problem: Analyzer reports: 'The name RenderRepaintBoundary isn't a type'. Likely a namespace confusion caused by the duplicate class definitions in shaders/lib/main.dart (Issue #1).
Fix: Delete shaders/lib/main.dart (Issue #1 fix). If error persists add: import 'package:flutter/rendering.dart';
